relations.subject: Cyprus wheatear
relations.evidence: This migratory insectivorous species breeds only in Cyprus, and winters in southern Sudan and Ethiopia. It has been recorded as a vagrant on Heligoland, Germany. This species closely resembles pied wheatear, although it has slightly more black on the tail and back, and on the head
